title: carduus bourgeanus var. devesae
intro: Carduus bourgeanus var. devesae, also known as the Devesa thistle, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Carduus bourgeanus plant, which is a type of thistle found in the Iberian Peninsula. The Devesa thistle is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Its health benefits are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds, which can help to protect against oxidative stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Carduus bourgeanus var. devesae include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health concerns.
